title: Kith app icon

subject.concept: A single rounded speech bubble that doubles as a private vault: a plump, friendly chat bubble with a small keyhole cut cleanly into its center, signalling an end-to-end encrypted messenger.
subject.form: One centered hero object, generous rounded corners, thick soft edges, slight forward tilt, filling about 78 percent of the frame with even margins.
subject.details: The keyhole is a simple circle over a tapered slot, recessed a few millimeters into the bubble face; the little tail of the speech bubble sits at the lower left.

style.look: 3D Pixar-style render, high-end mobile app icon, playful but premium and trustworthy
style.surface: smooth matte body with a faint satin sheen, soft rounded bevels, gentle ambient occlusion inside the keyhole recess only
style.finish: clean, tactile, no text, no letters, no numerals

materials.bubble_body: warm ember coral, base #FF5A2C grading to a slightly deeper #E8481F at the lower edge
materials.keyhole: recessed charcoal #14110F interior with a thin brushed-metal ring in warm off-white #FAF7F3
materials.accent: one subtle cool rim of deep violet #5A2CFF kept minimal, no more than a thin edge highlight

lighting: soft top-left key light with broad fill, gentle self-shadow contained within the object silhouette, even and clean, no dramatic contrast
camera: straight-on product shot, slight three-quarter tilt, 50mm feel, centered composition

background.notes: solid uniform green fill only, absolutely no gradient, no vignette, no floor, no reflection, no cast shadow onto the background, so the subject can be cut out to a clean transparent PNG

negative_prompt: no external glow, no bloom, no lens flare, no particles, no sparkles, no drop shadow on the background, no ground plane, no reflection, no text, no watermark, no border, no photorealistic skin, no clutter, no gradient background

output.usage: Source render for the iOS/Android app icon; background-remove the green to transparent, then export the standard icon and adaptive-icon sizes.
output.safe_area: keep the keyhole and bubble tail within the central 80 percent so nothing is clipped by the adaptive-icon mask
